picks.rationale: JNJ leads with +30.31% YTD and +15.11% 1-month momentum, supported by a diversified earnings engine beyond talc [alphastreet.com](https://news.alphastreet.com/johnson-johnson-jnj-has-a-diversified-earnings-engine-bigger-than-talc/), a low beta of 0.235, and a 2.07% dividend yield.
BAC shows strong momentum (+11.62% 1M, +7.59% YTD) with a low P/E of 14.85, a 1.87% dividend yield, and a strong_buy consensus; the Fiserv debit network deal could reshape payment fees.
Visa benefits from a strong_buy rating (an_score 1.37), +10.18% 1-month momentum, positive news sentiment (0.20), and a low beta of 0.754, with payment volumes supported by consumer spending.
Mastercard has a strong_buy consensus (an_score 1.32), +9.46% 1-month gain, the highest news sentiment (0.242) among payments peers, and low short interest of 0.76%.
JPMorgan combines +9.53% 1-month momentum with a low P/E of 16.15, a 1.78% dividend yield, and a buy rating; the bank benefits from a favorable rate environment and strong capital markets.
GE Aerospace has a strong_buy rating, +14.72% YTD and +14.10% 1-month returns, driven by defense spending surges and aerospace cycle tailwinds, though sentiment is slightly negative.
RTX delivers +12.42% 1-month and +8.07% YTD gains, with a low beta of 0.298, a 1.45% dividend yield, and a buy rating; defense spending and AI battlefield technology provide catalysts.

AbbVie shows +14.16% 1-month momentum and +12.87% YTD, with very high news sentiment (0.365) and a 2.72% dividend yield; Jefferies highlights it as a high-quality stock to navigate AI concerns [gurufocus.com](https://www.gurufocus.com/news/8947891/highquality-stocks-to-navigate-ai-investment-concerns-abbv-nflx), though P/E is elevated at 124.83.

UnitedHealth is the best-performing mega-cap healthcare stock in H1 with +29.01% YTD and +5.92% 1-month, supported by a low beta of 0.633, a 2.22% dividend yield, and the highest news sentiment (0.44) in the universe.
Coca-Cola offers +23.23% YTD and +6.35% 1-month returns, with a low beta of 0.349, a 2.56% dividend yield, and positive news sentiment (0.227), making it a resilient consumer staple play.

previous_picks.rationale: JNJ is the top pick with +28.27% YTD, a massive +17.83% 1-month surge, and an ultra-low beta of 0.235, supported by 64 consecutive years of dividend growth and a refreshed drug portfolio with DARZALEX and TREMFYA driving +9.9% Q1 revenue growth.
UNH boasts +28.16% YTD and +13.47% 1-month momentum, with strong double-digit revenue trends highlighted in a recent comparison to CVS, confirming its managed care leadership.
MRK has +23.49% YTD, +13.77% 1-month momentum, an ultra-low beta of 0.205, dividend yield of 2.62%, and the highest news sentiment (0.316) in the healthcare sector.

ABBV has surged +15.72% YTD and +20.24% in the last month, underpinned by strong pipeline momentum from recent RINVOQ and SKYRIZI approvals for new pediatric and dermatology indications, reinforcing its immunology franchise.

Visa delivers +4.95% YTD, +15.92% 1-month momentum, and upbeat news sentiment (0.168), with analysts rating it a strong_buy and cross-border payment volumes benefiting from a robust consumer backdrop.

Mastercard shows strong near-term momentum with +14.39% 1M and +10.32% 1W, supported by a strong_buy analyst consensus and low short interest of 0.76%, with recent stablecoin network news expanding its ecosystem.
GE Aerospace is up +17.87% YTD and +19.98% in the last month, with a strong_buy consensus and positive news sentiment (0.248), riding commercial aviation demand and defense spending tailwinds.

Novo Nordisk has reversed its year-long decline with +20.07% 1-month momentum, a low P/E of 12.09, and a recent UK Wegovy pill approval plus Medicare GLP-1 coverage, which analysts say could leave the stock 48% undervalued.
RTX has gained +15.47% over the last month with a low beta of 0.298, driven by defense spending and geopolitical tensions (Ukraine/Iran talks) that support its aerospace and defense order book.
Bank of America shows +12.66% 1-month momentum, a low P/E of 14.57, and a strong_buy analyst consensus, benefiting from Fed rate hike readjustment expectations and a healthy US consumer backdrop.
